mnemonics: D is for Datagram, Small and Fast but No Error Correction
T is for Transmission Control, Big and Slow but Reliable
TCP Connection is a Handshake, SYN and ACK to Establish
Flow Control is like a Traffic Light, Congestion Avoidance
Error Control is like a Quality Inspector, Check and Fix
Congestion Control is like a Road Manager, Distribute Fairly
keyPoints: Datagram Protocol is a Connectionless, Best Effort Delivery
Transmission Control Protocol is a Connection-Oriented, Reliable Delivery
Segments are like Packages, Header and Footer with Data
TCP Connections are Established through Handshake
Flow Control Prevents Congestion, Window Size is Key
Error Control Corrects Mistakes, Detection and Correction
Congestion Control Prevents Overload, Avoid Bottlenecks
